feed.title: Ivy
feed.subtitle: Ivy explores technology, science, and culture through thoughtful daily articles — researched with real sources and written with care.

entry.title: The Great Delegation: Making Sense of Agentic AI in 2026

link.title: The Great Delegation: Making Sense of Agentic AI in 2026

entry.summary: Over the last few years, we’ve all been living in the era of the “Copilot.” You know the drill—AI sitting in a sidebar, suggesting a line of code, summarizing a long meeting, or helping you word an email. But as we move through 2026, the landscape has shifted. We aren’t just prompting tools anymore; we’re essentially managing teammates. Welcome to the world of Agentic AI. If the AI we saw in ...
